# Satark-AI: Deepfake Detection & Speaker Verification Platform

> Satark-AI is a production-grade deepfake detection and speaker verification platform using Wav2Vec2, NVIDIA NIM Vision AI, and ECAPA-TDNN voice biometrics.

## Docs
- [Satark-AI Home](https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app/terms)
- [About](https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app/about)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/theunstopabble/Satark-AI)

## Features
- Audio deepfake detection via Wav2Vec2 + MFCC spectral analysis
- Image deepfake detection via NVIDIA NIM Vision AI (Llama 3.2-90B)
- Speaker identity verification via ECAPA-TDNN voice biometrics
- Live microphone deepfake monitoring
- Forensic PDF report generation
- PWA offline support

## Structure
Satark-AI is a Turborepo monorepo with 4 services: [web (React/Vite)](https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app/), api (FastAPI Python), engine (Node.js/Hono), and worker (background jobs).
